security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Official DOM desktop wallet with an embedded node.
bundle.longDescription: DOM Wallet runs a full DOM node embedded in the app, mines, and receives coinbase rewards into an encrypted wallet. Privacy by design, sovereign by choice.
